name: Homemade Bran Flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the bran, whole wheat flour, nonfat dry milk powder, brewer's yeast (if using), and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture and add the oil, molasses, and water.
3. Mix well until a dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into three equal parts.
5. Roll out each part as thin as possible on greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned and crisp.
7. If the dough is not completely dry, turn off the oven and let it remain until it is crispy.
8. Break into small pieces.
9. Store in an airtight container. Makes 1 pound of cereal.
